examples: When binding, the document hasn't been put trimly that make some paper haven't been bound.
When she was trimly dressed she was rather a sweet little being, with large eyes and a sad mouth.
The trimly bearded, stocky Mr Meshal, relaxed and often humorous, plainly thinks time is on his side.
Cut at some remove from Barbara Karinska's original light-and-breezy creations, Mr. Loquasto's short dresses for the women and shirts and slacks for the men are trimly tailored but dull of detail.
